ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND ( NOT(ISNEW()), RecordType.DeveloperName ='Data_Escalation', /* Data Escalation */ $Profile.Name <>'SW CSM Internal', $Profile.Name <>'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <>'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <>'SW Sales Internal',
$Profile.Name <>'SW Support', $Profile.Name <>'SW Sales Internal - STRAT', $Profile.Name <>'SW Sales External', $Profile.Name <>'SW Management', $Profile.Name <>'SW Product', $Profile.Name <>'SW Client Services', $Profile.Name <>'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <>'Integration User', $Profile.Name <>'Integration User - API Only', $Profile.Name <>'Integration User No DF', $User.Id <> '005b0000000lqbnAAA', /*Automated Process*/ $User.Id <> '005b0000000lqbn' /*Automated Process*/ )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don't have the permissions to edit this record type. Please contact SalesOps
